velocity.method: Commit histories of makeready-iphone (277), makeready-server (366), makeready-web (658), makeready-capture (8) and the consolidated monorepo (241) were clustered into delivery epics. The 12-month plan assumes ~1.5 feature-epic-equivalents per month — conservative vs. the demonstrated 4.9 — to absorb verification, production hardening and unknowns.

budget.planCovers: Claude Max plan — Opus 4.8 tokens for routine implementation work
budget.extraTokensModel: Fable 5 billed as extra tokens from 2026-07-07: $10/M input, $50/M output, ~$1/M cache reads, $12.50/M cache writes

measurement.source: Local Claude Code session transcripts (233 files, 13,501 assistant messages)
measurement.window: 2026-06-11 to 2026-07-05 (25 days; older transcripts not retained)

epics.name: Server Bootstrap, CI/CD & Deployment
epics.description: Express + Prisma + PostgreSQL API stood up from zero and hardened for production on Railway.
deliverables: Railway deploys, Docker, Atlas migration pipeline

epics.name: Authentication, Orgs & RBAC
epics.description: Full identity layer: phone (Twilio) verification for members, Google OAuth for leaders, org-scoped roles and permissions.
deliverables: Twilio SMS verification + STOP webhook + consent
Member/organization many-to-many model with RBAC roles
API-key auth, sliding sessions, bot protection, beta access codes

epics.name: Groups, Invites, Posts & Events APIs
epics.description: Core community model: groups with join codes, invitation and approval workflows, posts and recurring events.

epics.name: Bible API & Search
epics.description: Scripture backbone via API.Bible with caching, multi-version support and keyword search.

epics.name: Study Programs & Enrollment Engine
epics.description: The curriculum engine: programs, lessons, schedules and the member enrollment lifecycle.
deliverables: Enrollment engine with progress + completion tracking

epics.name: Lesson Activities, Read Blocks & Themes
epics.description: Rich lesson content model: multi-block reading activities, YouTube/Exegesis types and a file-based theme system.
deliverables: Text theme system with backgrounds and fonts

epics.name: Media Pipeline & AI Enrichment
epics.description: Cloudflare-backed media platform with Claude AI enrichment of every asset.
deliverables: Cloudflare Stream video upload + R2 storage
Claude AI alt-text and tag enrichment
Media library with usage tracking + full-text search

epics.name: Notifications & Activity Logging
epics.description: Unified activity model powering the in-app notification feed and push delivery.
deliverables: In-app notification feed with APNs push

epics.name: API Documentation & Developer Tooling
epics.description: Complete OpenAPI documentation and developer tooling across all 43 route modules.
deliverables: MCP reference servers for AI-assisted development

epics.name: Semantic Bible Search (AI)
epics.description: Concept-level Bible search: ask a question in plain language, get relevant passages.

epics.name: SMS A2P Compliance System
epics.description: Carrier-compliant SMS campaign system required for production texting at scale.
deliverables: A2P campaign templating, rate limiting, audit logging
Optional-consent join flow + opt-in proof PDF

epics.name: Org Roles & Content Authorization
epics.description: Org-role-based authorization across content endpoints — the foundation the future ACL system builds on.

epics.name: iOS App Foundation & Release Infra
epics.description: SwiftUI app scaffold through TestFlight/production release automation.

epics.name: iOS Design System & Component Library
epics.description: The 122-component SwiftUI design system every screen is built from.

epics.name: iOS Bible Reader & Highlighting
epics.description: Full native Bible reader with search, translation switching and persistent highlighting.

epics.name: iOS Study Program Authoring
epics.description: Leaders create and manage complete study programs from their phone.
deliverables: AI tag suggestions, covers, publish/draft states

epics.name: iOS Enrollment Flow
epics.description: Bidirectional member enrollment with smart scheduling.

epics.name: iOS Lesson Activity Editors
epics.description: Rich slide-in editors for all five activity types with live preview.
deliverables: Theme + background pickers with live preview

epics.name: iOS Video Recording & Media Library
epics.description: In-app video recorder (with teleprompter) and virtualized media library.
deliverables: Virtualized media grid with zoom detail

epics.name: iOS Dashboard, Search & Notifications
epics.description: Leader home dashboard, global search and push-linked notification feed.

epics.name: iOS Member Invitations & QR Codes
epics.description: Invite members via contacts, share sheets and server-generated QR codes.

epics.name: iOS Architecture Audit & Hardening
epics.description: Systematic post-audit remediation: navigation, state safety, error surfacing, tests and lint gates.
deliverables: ~100 silent failures rerouted to visible errors

epics.name: Member Web Experience
epics.description: Member-facing web: group home, study home, profile — with native-app feel.

epics.name: Public Join & Phone Verification
epics.description: The public front door: join a group/study/event by code with SMS verification.
deliverables: Keypad phone entry + SMS verify flow

epics.name: Laravel Migration & Component System
epics.description: Replatformed the web client from a React SPA to Laravel + Vue islands with a 52-component library — in four days.

epics.name: Admin Panel & Analytics Dashboard
epics.description: Full leader/admin console: CRUD for every domain object plus a KPI analytics dashboard — in one week.
deliverables: Admin shell with Pinia stores + API proxy
CRUD for groups, programs, lessons, enrollments, posts

epics.name: Design System Migration (PrimeVue)
epics.description: Consolidated the admin UI onto PrimeVue, retiring 16 hand-written SCSS files.
deliverables: Tailwind v4 + PrimeVue styled mode migration

epics.name: Lesson Player: Themes & Activities
epics.description: The member lesson experience: themed slides, video, reading and interactive input.
deliverables: Code-based theme engine (Star Wars crawl, Typewriter, ...)
All activity types incl. exegesis highlighting

epics.name: SMS Compliance & Legal Pages
epics.description: Privacy/terms/SMS opt-in surfaces required for carrier approval.

epics.name: Marketing Site & Beta Program
epics.description: YAML-driven marketing website and Google-OAuth beta join page.

epics.name: Web Platform & Infrastructure
epics.description: Everything that keeps the web client shippable: CI/CD, containers, tests, logging.

epics.name: Member Group Home & Analytics Redesign
epics.description: Redesigned member group home and study-engagement analytics.

epics.name: Interactive Lesson Preview & Reading Themes
epics.description: Auto-saving interactive preview and native-scroll reading themes shared across platforms.

epics.name: Capture Tool (Visual Regression)
epics.description: Internal manifest-driven screenshot tool capturing both web and iPhone simulator.

epics.name: Monorepo Consolidation & CI/CD
epics.description: Merged four repos into one with unified CI and build-once image promotion.

epics.name: iPhone-Web Pixel-Parity Compare System
epics.description: Built Vue twins of 80+ iPhone components with automated pixel-diff comparison — the engine that makes web parity fast and provable.

epics.name: LeaderApp Parity Port: Study Mgmt & Groups
epics.description: Porting iPhone leader screens to the web with pixel parity: 7 screens verified, 7 more wired and awaiting live verification.
deliverables: Program home + all lesson editors verified
Bible passage picker + overlay system built

epics.name: Web Client: 100% iPhone Parity
epics.description: Finish the remaining 20 of 27 tracked screens (13 not started, 7 awaiting verification) plus the Bible reader page, so every leader workflow on iPhone works identically on the web.
deliverables: Verify the 7 wired screens (groups chain, exegesis editor, video picker)
Member profile, requests, enrollment flow + scheduling
Calendar month grid, global search, notification feed
Org home, invite contacts, Bible reader page

epics.name: Content Collaborator Invitations
epics.description: Group leaders invite anyone — including people who are not members or leaders — to create and edit study programs, lessons, enrolled-lesson content and related material.
deliverables: Collaborator invite model (email/SMS, status tracking, withdrawal)
Invitation accept flow with account bootstrap
Collaborator access to program/lesson editors on web

epics.name: ACL Permissions for Invited Users
epics.description: Fine-grained access control so a leader specifies exactly what each invited person can do — per-resource CRUD grants on study programs, lessons, enrolled lessons and content.
deliverables: Permission editor UI (per collaborator, per program)

epics.name: Group Leader Community (Content Marketplace)
epics.description: An app-store-like community where leaders publish study programs for other leaders to discover, use for enrollment, discuss and build upon — with versioning and creator-to-creator engagement.
deliverables: One-click 'use for my group' enrollment cloning
Comments + leader-to-leader messaging on published content
Content versioning with update notifications to adopters

epics.name: Org SSO & Domain-Controlled Access
epics.description: Organizations toggle between invite-only and open domain access: anyone with an email at the org's domain (Google, Microsoft, generic OIDC) can join automatically.
deliverables: Domain verification + org toggle (invite-only vs domain-open)
Org admin controls and member deprovisioning

epics.name: Member Analytics & Behavior Tracking
epics.description: Instrument every lesson interaction to learn where members spend time, where they get stuck, and where they accelerate — so the experience improves with data instead of guesses.
deliverables: Client event pipeline (web + iPhone) with batching
Per-activity dwell time, drop-off and completion funnels
Leader dashboard: cohort progress, struggle points

epics.name: AI Growth Insights & Summarization
epics.description: Route all user input (SOAP entries, notes, answers, reflections) through AI analysis so members can see how they are growing and what they have learned from completed content.
deliverables: Unified user-input capture across all activity types
AI analysis pipeline (themes, sentiment, growth signals)

epics.name: Hardening, Perf & Release Buffer
epics.description: Deliberate schedule buffer for verification debt, performance and polish before the 12-month mark.

epics.name: Events & Calendar Completion
epics.description: Recommended: finish the original events vision — RSVP, ICS compatibility, event channels and reminders (APIs partially exist).

epics.name: Challenges (Habit & Accountability Engine)
epics.description: Recommended: the recurring-cadence challenge system from the original vision — the densest unbuilt domain (14 stories) and a major retention driver. Needs new infrastructure: a per-period frequency engine and scheduled push reminders.
deliverables: Recurring frequency engine (per-period objectives, member-adjustable timing)
Per-period questions: multiple-choice + freeform, timed notifications
Leader solicitation workflow (filtered member selection, notify, withdraw)
Scheduled push reminders without opening the app
Curriculum integration (challenges inside programs), iPhone + web

epics.name: Goals & Accountability
epics.description: Recommended: personal goals with reminders, group accountability sharing, and linking goal progress to challenge objectives — builds directly on the challenge engine.
deliverables: Share goals with group for accountability
Link goals to challenges (progress tracked against objectives)
Leader solicitation of goals, templates from past goals

epics.name: Group Communication (Chat)
epics.description: Recommended: group chat, direct messages, mentions and moderation — the largest unbuilt domain from the original stories.

epics.name: Org Billing & Payments
epics.description: Recommended: subscription billing for organizations — prerequisite for monetizing the leader community marketplace.

epics.name: Moderation & Safety Controls
epics.description: Recommended: AI-assisted content moderation and org-level safety policies — required before community content and chat scale.
